title: Treaty of Versailles
abstract: Treaty of Versailles may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outperform general platforms. Negotiate peace in 5...
abstract_zh: 《凡尔赛条约》小而美，精准解决纷争大事！在这个AI泛滥成灾的时代，专精工具才能脱颖而出。用它，五分钟搞定和平谈判，让世界从此没有战争！（其实可能只是停火协议……）
